option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:id="@+id/goal_set_root" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:padding="24dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/goal_set_title" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/goal_set_title" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.Material3.TitleLarge" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/goal_set_placeholder" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:text="@string/goal_set_placeholder" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.Material3.BodyMedium" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/goal_set_title" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:id="@+id/goal_set_root" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent">
<com.google.android.material.appbar.AppBarLayout android:id="@+id/goal_set_app_bar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent">
<com.google.android.material.appbar.MaterialToolbar android:id="@+id/goal_set_toolbar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:title="@string/goal_set_title" /> </com.google.android.material.appbar.AppBarLayout>
<androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView android:id="@+id/goal_set_scroll" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="0dp" android:fillViewport="true" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toBottomOf="@id/goal_set_app_bar">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="24dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/goal_set_form_title" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/goal_set_form_title" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.Material3.TitleMedium" />
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/goal_set_name_layout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:hint="@string/goal_set_name_label">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/goal_set_name" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/goal_set_target_value_layout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:hint="@string/goal_set_target_value_label">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/goal_set_target_value" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="numberDecimal" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/goal_set_target_metric_layout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:hint="@string/goal_set_target_metric_label">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/goal_set_target_metric" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/goal_set_deadline_layout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:hint="@string/goal_set_deadline_label">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/goal_set_deadline" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:cursorVisible="false" android:focusable="false" android:inputType="none" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/goal_set_notes_layout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:hint="@string/goal_set_notes_label">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/goal_set_notes" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="textMultiLine" android:minLines="3" /> </com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/goal_set_submit" style="@style/Widget.Material3.Button" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="20dp" android:text="@string/goal_set_submit" /> </LinearLayout> </androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView>
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">Task Management App</string> <string name="login_title">Welcome</string> <string name="auth_username_hint">Username</string> <string name="auth_password_hint">Password</string> <string name="auth_action_continue">Continue</string> <string name="auth_switch_to_register">Don\'t have an account? Sign up here.</string> <string name="auth_switch_to_login">Already have an account? Log in here.</string> <string name="auth_title_login">Login</string> <string name="auth_title_register">Register</string> <string name="auth_action_login">Login</string> <string name="auth_action_register">Register</string> <string name="home_title">Home</string> <string name="home_subtitle">You are logged in. This is a placeholder home screen.</string> <string name="home_analytics_title">Weekly Activity Analytics</string> <string name="home_analytics_placeholder">Chart placeholder</string> <string name="home_recent_title">Recent Activities</string> <string name="home_add_task">Add task</string> <string name="home_add_action_title">Quick actions</string> <string name="home_action_set_goal">Set goal</string> <string name="home_action_add_workout_log">Add workout log</string> <string name="activities_title">All Activities</string> <string name="activities_placeholder">Activity list placeholder</string> <string name="goal_set_title">Set Goal</string> <string name="goal_set_placeholder">Goal setup screen placeholder</string> <string name="workout_log_title">Workout Log</string> <string name="workout_log_placeholder">Workout log screen placeholder</string> <string name="workout_log_form_title">Add workout log</string> <string name="workout_log_activity_type_label">Activity type</string> <string name="workout_log_duration_label">Duration</string> <string name="workout_log_metric_label">Metric</string> <string name="workout_log_date_label">Date (YYYY-MM-DD)</string> <string name="workout_log_calories_label">Calories</string> <string name="workout_log_location_label">Location</string> <string name="workout_log_submit">Submit</string> <string name="workout_log_date_picker_title">Select date</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">Task Management App</string> <string name="login_title">Welcome</string> <string name="auth_username_hint">Username</string> <string name="auth_password_hint">Password</string> <string name="auth_action_continue">Continue</string> <string name="auth_switch_to_register">Don\'t have an account? Sign up here.</string> <string name="auth_switch_to_login">Already have an account? Log in here.</string> <string name="auth_title_login">Login</string> <string name="auth_title_register">Register</string> <string name="auth_action_login">Login</string> <string name="auth_action_register">Register</string> <string name="home_title">Home</string> <string name="home_subtitle">You are logged in. This is a placeholder home screen.</string> <string name="home_analytics_title">Weekly Activity Analytics</string> <string name="home_analytics_placeholder">Chart placeholder</string> <string name="home_recent_title">Recent Activities</string> <string name="home_add_task">Add task</string> <string name="home_add_action_title">Quick actions</string> <string name="home_action_set_goal">Set goal</string> <string name="home_action_add_workout_log">Add workout log</string> <string name="activities_title">All Activities</string> <string name="activities_placeholder">Activity list placeholder</string> <string name="goal_set_title">Set Goal</string> <string name="goal_set_placeholder">Goal setup screen placeholder</string> <string name="workout_log_title">Workout Log</string> <string name="workout_log_placeholder">Workout log screen placeholder</string> <string name="workout_log_form_title">Add workout log</string> <string name="workout_log_activity_type_label">Activity type</string> <string name="workout_log_duration_label">Duration</string> <string name="workout_log_metric_label">Metric</string> <string name="workout_log_date_label">Date (YYYY-MM-DD)</string> <string name="workout_log_calories_label">Calories</string> <string name="workout_log_location_label">Location</string> <string name="workout_log_submit">Submit</string> <string name="workout_log_date_picker_title">Select date</string> <string name="goal_set_form_title">Add goal</string> <string name="goal_set_name_label">Goal name</string> <string name="goal_set_target_value_label">Target value</string> <string name="goal_set_target_metric_label">Target metric</string> <string name="goal_set_deadline_label">Target date (YYYY-MM-DD)</string> <string name="goal_set_notes_label">Notes</string> <string name="goal_set_submit">Submit</string> <string name="goal_set_date_picker_title">Select target date</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">Task Management App</string> <string name="login_title">Welcome</string> <string name="auth_toggle_login">Login</string> <string name="auth_toggle_register">Register</string> <string name="auth_username_hint">Username</string> <string name="auth_email_hint">Email</string> <string name="auth_action_continue">Continue</string> </resources>
